bird.name: 红头犀鸟
bird.summary: 红头犀鸟（學名：Rhabdotorrhinus waldeni，台湾作皺嘴皺盔犀鳥）是犀鳥目犀鳥科斑盔犀鳥屬下的一種鳥類。該物種僅分布於菲律賓的班乃岛及内格罗斯岛中的常綠低地森林及山地森林內，是中等大小的森林型犀鳥。但因族群稀少及居住環境被破壞的問題，目前被列為極危物種。 本物…

locations.name: 班乃岛
locations.summary: 班乃岛（Panay），是菲律宾中部米沙鄢群岛西部的一个岛屿，位于民都洛岛东南，内格罗斯岛西北。 面积12011平方公里，人口3,973,877人（2007年）。气候炎热多雨；山地、丘陵相间，中部有较大的滨海平原。

locations.name: 内格罗斯岛
locations.summary: 内格罗斯岛（英語：Negros）是菲律宾位于中部的米沙鄢群岛主岛，也是菲律宾第四大岛（仅次於呂宋島、民答那峨島和薩馬島），面积13,309.6平方公里，人口约370万（2000年）。 内格罗斯岛沿中部山脉分为两个省：属于中米沙鄢大区的东内…

relations.subject: 红头犀鸟
relations.evidence: As most other hornbills, this species is primarily a frugivore.]] It inhabits closed-canopy forests, also frequenting logged areas and occasionally isolated trees in clearings at an altitudinal range of 400 to 1,200 m Panay and 350 to 950 m in Negros

relations.subject: 红头犀鸟
relations.evidence: Due to this high poaching rate, Philincon has devised a nest guarding program where they pay locals US$20 a month to guard hornbill nests and offer an incentive of US$11 for each successful fledge
relations.object_summary: 直接捕杀或非法贸易导致种群下降。

relations.subject: 红头犀鸟
relations.evidence: It is unknown if these numbers remain the same as poaching appears to have increased considerably and poached birds have been detected outside the Philippines in Indonesia and the Hungary indicating that this species is now traded internationally Local organizations such as Haribon Foundation and Philippines Biodiversity Conservation Foundation were opposed to the downlisting due to increased poaching, not being in a protected area and if original estimates from 2007 were correct and not double counted. Walden's hornbill reproduce very slowly and thus are unable to survive high hunting pressures coupled with heavy logging of the rainforests
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.subject: 红头犀鸟
relations.evidence: It is unknown if these numbers remain the same as poaching appears to have increased considerably and poached birds have been detected outside the Philippines in Indonesia and the Hungary indicating that this species is now traded internationally Local organizations such as Haribon Foundation and Philippines Biodiversity Conservation Foundation were opposed to the downlisting due to increased poaching, not being in a protected area and if original estimates from 2007 were correct and not double counted. Walden's hornbill reproduce very slowly and thus are unable to survive high hunting pressures coupled with heavy logging of the rainforests
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
